name: Sarah Chen
testimonial: CareerSage helped me discover career paths I never considered. The AI analysis of my skills and interests was incredibly accurate and gave me a clear direction for my future.

name: Marcus Williams
testimonial: After 5 years in retail, I wanted to switch careers but felt lost. CareerSage provided a detailed roadmap that made the transition feel achievable. Now I'm studying data science!

name: Priya Patel
testimonial: The simulation feature blew my mind! Being able to visualize myself in different career scenarios made my decision so much clearer. Highly recommend!

name: James O'Brien
testimonial: I was overwhelmed choosing a college major. CareerSage broke down each path with real salary data and growth projections. It made the decision feel less scary.

name: Aisha Mohammed
testimonial: The voice chat felt like talking to a real career counselor. It asked thoughtful follow-up questions and really understood my unique situation as an international student.
